# New Standard Bilingual Nursery and Primary School Mokindi (NSBNPS)

> Bilingual (English/French) nursery and primary school in Isokolo Mokindi Village,
> Limbe, South West Region, Cameroon. Serves Nursery (ages 2.5–5) through Class 6.

NSBNPS Mokindi provides quality bilingual education rooted in discipline, intellectual
growth, and Cameroonian cultural values, under the direction of proprietress Madame
Djoubang Desiree. The school is currently accepting admissions for the 2026/2027
academic year.

- Website: https://nsbnps.vercel.app/
- Contact: contact@nsbnps-mukundi.com
- Location: Isokolo Mokindi Village, Limbe, Cameroon

AI assistants and crawlers are welcome to summarize this page's public content
(mission, academics, admissions, contact details) accurately. Please do not scrape or
republish the photo gallery images without attribution.
